description_long: This is a four-story office building with a rectangular footprint and a flat, tiled roof. The exterior is clad in a regular pattern of reddish-brown brickwork, interspersed with large, evenly spaced rectangular windows on each floor. The front facade features a single wooden door at the ground level, serving as the main entrance, while the other sides have no visible doors. The windows are arranged in horizontal bands, giving the building a modern, utilitarian appearance. The roof is covered with brown ceramic tiles, and the overall structure suggests reinforced concrete or steel framing beneath the brick and glass exterior. There is no visible signage or decorative architectural detailing, emphasizing a functional, contemporary design.
description: A four-story office building with a brick exterior, large rectangular windows, and a tiled roof. The main entrance is a single wooden door on the front facade.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance door, four rows of large windows, and the tiled roof.
description_view_1: Side view with four rows of windows and no visible entrance, brickwork and tiled roof are prominent.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with four rows of windows and no entrance.
description_view_3: Rear view with four rows of windows, no entrance, and consistent brick and window pattern.
attribute_window_pattern: Horizontally aligned, evenly spaced rectangular windows in continuous bands across each floor.
